title: Vi Menorca Fest (Menorca Wine Festival)
location: Plazas de España y del Carme, Maó
description: Maó becomes the capital of wine with the first major edition of Vi Menorca Fest, bringing the island's twelve wineries onto a route between Plaça d'Espanya and Plaça del Carme. The main day, 2 May, offers tastings, blind tastings and aroma workshops; the festival closes on 3 May with open-day visits to five wineries (booking required).
